# Generated File Inventory

## Source and Configuration

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `pyproject.toml` | Package metadata and LangGraph dependencies |
| `requirements.txt` | Minimal runtime dependency list |
| `config.example.json` | Portable configuration template |
| `config.local.json` | Current-machine configuration, ignored by Git |
| `.gitignore` | Excludes environment, cache, local config, and outputs |

## Agent Package

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `src/tabref_agent/config.py` | Validated path, review-mode, and learning configuration |
| `src/tabref_agent/state.py` | Typed LangGraph state contract |
| `src/tabref_agent/tools.py` | Existing-script adapter and command logging |
| `src/tabref_agent/nodes.py` | Node implementations, review routing, and learning nodes |
| `src/tabref_agent/graph.py` | StateGraph definition and Mermaid diagram |
| `src/tabref_agent/cli.py` | Run, resume, status, plan, diagram, and Skill approval commands |
| `src/tabref_agent/learning.py` | Human-feedback learning, policy optimization, memory, and Skill approval helpers |
| `src/tabref_agent/__init__.py` | Package version |

## Scripts and Tests

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `scripts/run_agent.ps1` | Short PowerShell launcher |
| `tests/test_config.py` | Path-resolution tests |
| `tests/test_routing.py` | Review-mode routing tests |
| `tests/test_graph.py` | Graph compilation and parallel Send tests |
| `tests/test_learning.py` | Candidate-policy metrics and Skill approval tests |

## Documentation

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `README.md` | Project introduction and quick start |
| `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` | Boundaries, nodes, state, and reliability design |
| `docs/USAGE.md` | Full local, Codex CLI, and learning usage |
| `docs/SELF_LEARNING.md` | Human-feedback learning and Skill approval contract |
| `docs/V2_ROADMAP.md` | Completed v0.3 work and remaining expansion plan |
| `docs/GENERATED_FILES.md` | This source-file inventory |
| `docs/agent_graph.mmd` | Standalone Mermaid graph |
| `docs/build_agent_document.py` | Optional local Word document builder |

## Runtime Outputs

The agent writes to the configured output directory, for example:

```text
outputs/agent_runs
```

Important runtime files:

| Pattern | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `checkpoints.sqlite` | LangGraph thread checkpoints |
| `logs/*_07_codex_review_<paper>.json` | Independent per-paper Codex review logs |
| `logs/*.json` | Other structured project-tool logs |
| `<job_id>_run_summary.json` | Machine-readable run result |
| `<job_id>_run_summary.md` | Human-readable run result |

Learning files:

| Pattern | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `learning/human_child_feedback.jsonl` | Immutable human child-level labels |
| `learning/memory/events.jsonl` | Human correction events and candidate signal snapshots |
| `learning/memory/lessons.json` | Human-supported learned rules |
| `learning/reflections/*.json` | Background self-review summaries |
| `learning/candidate_policy/active.json` | Active rule weights and review threshold |
| `learning/candidate_policy/history/*.json` | Previous candidate-policy snapshots |
| `learning/skill_proposals/pending/*` | Skill proposals awaiting human approval |
| `learning/skill_history/tabref-table-text-child-selector/*` | Historical live Skill snapshots |

The agent also refreshes the existing project artifacts generated by the
underlying pipeline. It does not create duplicate copies of large OCR or
candidate datasets.
